question: Where is the proof package?

demands.name: Users
demands.demand: Show the proof before asking for trust.

demands.name: DAOs
demands.demand: Show the Evidence Docket before treasury funds move.

demands.name: Foundations
demands.demand: Show milestone proof before grants close.

demands.name: Auditors
demands.demand: Show finding-to-fix trace before remediation claims mature.

demands.name: Validators
demands.demand: Show replay and rollback readiness before upgrades.

demands.name: Enterprises
demands.demand: Show signed acceptance records before adoption.

demands.name: Investors
demands.demand: Show proof of execution, not only narrative traction.

iconicLines: Blockchain proves the transaction. GoalOS proves the work.
No Proof. No Trust. No Settlement.
Do not just move value. Prove it was earned.
plainEnglishRule: Do not ask communities to trust a blockchain project because it sounds credible. Show what was promised, what was delivered, what evidence exists, who reviewed it, what risk remains, and what justifies settlement.
